title: Rich Molten Ciabatta Sandwich
description: A rich and indulgent sandwich featuring ciabatta bread, lamination-puff, with a touch of shojin-friendly ingredients for a kid-friendly Mexican (Yucatecan) dish served in a donabe.

ingredients.name: Shojin-friendly cheese or mild cheese substitute

instructions: Preheat the donabe to medium-high heat.
Toast ciabatta slices until golden brown and slightly crispy on both sides.
Arrange lamination-puff between toasted ciabatta slices.
Top with shojin-friendly cheese or mild cheese substitute for melted goodness.
Spread avocado mayonnaise or use tomato salsa/guacamole as desired to enhance flavors.
Close the donabe and let it simmer until the sandwich is hot and melty on top.
